title: Delete Alarm
description: Deletes an alarm on the given device. This endpoint is supported for trackers that support alarms.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: tracker-id
parameters.description: The ID of the tracker for which the alarm is to be deleted. The tracker-id can be found by using the Get Devices endpoint.

parameters.name: alarm-id
parameters.description: The ID of the alarm to be deleted. The alarm-id can be found by using the Get Alarms endpoint.
